obligations.rule: The input must be a valid fully qualified domain name (FQDN) by default.
obligations.why: The function is designed to validate FQDNs under default settings.

obligations.rule: The input must include a TLD unless `require_tld` is set to false.
obligations.why: The `require_tld` option controls whether a TLD is mandatory.

obligations.rule: The input must not contain underscores unless `allow_underscores` is set to true.
obligations.why: Underscores are not allowed in FQDNs unless explicitly permitted.

obligations.rule: The input must not end with a trailing dot unless `allow_trailing_dot` is set to true.
obligations.why: Trailing dots are not valid in FQDNs unless explicitly permitted.

obligations.rule: The input must not have a numeric-only TLD unless `allow_numeric_tld` is set to true.
obligations.why: Numeric-only TLDs are not valid unless explicitly permitted.

obligations.rule: The input must not start with `*.` unless `allow_wildcard` is set to true.
obligations.why: Wildcard domains are not valid unless explicitly permitted.

obligations.rule: The input must not exceed the standard max length unless `ignore_max_length` is set to true.
obligations.why: Domain length is restricted unless explicitly ignored.

test_groups.title: Default behavior validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator without any options set.

test_groups.title: Validation with require_tld set to false
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when TLD is not required.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_underscores set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when underscores are allowed in the domain.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_trailing_dot set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when trailing dots are allowed in the domain.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_numeric_tld set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when numeric-only TLDs are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_wildcard set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when wildcard domains are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with ignore_max_length set to true
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when length restrictions are ignored.
